scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=development tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.dev:test: cross-env NODE_ENV=test npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=test tsx watch ./src/test/integration/user.test.ts
scripts.migrate:up: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=development migrate-mongo up
scripts.migrate:down: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=development migrate-mongo down
scripts.migrate:up:test: cross-env NODE_ENV=test npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=test  migrate-mongo up
scripts.migrate:down:test: cross-env NODE_ENV=test npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=test migrate-mongo down
scripts.test: cross-env NODE_ENV=test npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=test vitest run
scripts.test:watch: cross-env NODE_ENV=test npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=test vitest --watch
scripts.test:run: cross-env NODE_ENV=test npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=test vitest run
